channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: Why does /biz hate Pokemon? I've literally told many of you for YEARS to invest in it but you all still think it's just… — 64 replies — 256.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Why does /biz hate Pokemon? I've literally told many of you for YEARS to invest in it but you all still think it's just…

Open thread • Replies: 64 • Updated: 2026-05-03 16:58 UTC

OP

Why does /biz hate Pokemon? I've literally told many of you for YEARS to invest in it but you all still think it's just a stupid card game for children.

Early replies (first 3)

62181434
>>62181426
No I rather not sit on ebay all day getting messages from browns trying to haggle the prices down. Easier and more convient ways to make money, this shit will have so many bagholders just like the meme sport cards

62181436
I have a box of pokemon cards that I had when I was a kid, are they worth anything or just the rare shiny card in absolute peak mint condition?

62181438
>>62181426
How can shiny plastic cards cost so much? Even if they're limited in supply, how can there exist so much demand for them?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62183274
too illiquid and counterfeits are getting too good

62183294
>>62183004
Here's the thing about pokemon "collectors" most of them don't stay in the hobby for more than 5 years, most of them are just passing through. If you actually understood the history of the pokemon market, and participated in it outside of the relatively recent booms, you'd know that current valuations are all speculative hype. I'm just a humble autist who collected before these speculative retards entered the space, and I've netted quite the hefty profit off of their naive investment thesis.

62183306
>>62181426
>Muh physical bing bing wahoo NFTs
Lol, lmao even.

62183308
>>62181438
Try actually selling though - it's an illiquid market.

62183377
>>62183306
>He keeps dealing in the real world instead of monetizing bing bing wahoos
Kek, ngmi even.

62183400
>>62183191
>actual tangible
That does nothing because it's a children's toy, you fucking idiot. Cryptocoins like Hype next year or Avantis last year or Aero in 2024 went the distance and minted millionaires because they have utility within the crypto ecosystems whether that be RWAs, Perpdexes or Basechain, but you're too much of a retarded scammer faggot to understand the difference between something like SNDK, a stock which deals in NAND DRAM 10xing in 8 months and your little worthless beanie baby bubble because like I said in your head youv'e removed even the veneer of this shit being useful and probably are upset because you invested in dogcoins or BAYC in 2021 because you're not a serious person.

62183413
>>62183400
> Cryptocoins like Hype next year or Avantis last year or Aero in 2024
> because you're not a serious person.

I’ll take Pokémon over this garbage any day of the week.

62183417
>>62181426
an article like this = top is in.

look for the next thing

62183441
>>62181426
i assume that only english and japanese cards are worth something? i got a vendor machine where you can buy german packs but nobody uses it

62183444
>>62181426
>it's just a stupid card game for children.
correct

62183488
where am i supposed to sell 4 of these things without getting scammed?

62183494
You are unironically not bullish enough on Nintendo. See past the fud. See how they already are the next Disney and will control the entertainment industry for the next 15 years and at least for the next 100 years.

62183720
I collect magic cards
I find the game fun and me and my friends play together every few weeks.
Its a comfy investment but not a great one.
pokemon seems lonely since no one actually plays the game.

62183729
>>62183016
Yeah and the art market is totally controlled by a bunch of NY Jews.

62183736
>>62183488
Any local card shop will buy that due to its rarity, just keep calling up all the ones in your area. Goddamn I still feel sick to the stomach thinking how many of those I opened back when it was still cheap.

62183741
>>62183494
They've almost surpassed Disney already.

62183742
>>62183736
i dont wanna sell for half price though. card shops are all run by jews that will look you in the eye and shake your hand as they lie to you and rape you
>ebay buyers will scam me
>fb marketplace buyers will jump me and rob me
>card shops will rape me
>not gonna sit at a table at a convention and talk to 8 year olds and their single dads all day either
i think im just fucked

62183751
>>62183742
Good, don't sell it because it's just going to keep going up in value anyway. In 10 years it'll probably be worth almost $10k anyway.

62183755
>>62183751
this is the top
https://x.com/ashrobin/status/2050649139185115368

62183776
>>62183755
He's talked about Pokemon for years though, that's nothing new. The absolute peak will probably be this September when the 30th anniversary set comes out. After that will probably be a cool off period but Pokemon always comes back up over time.

62183785
>>62183082
I couldn't imagine being a legal assistant. That shit is gay.

t. Lawyer

62183787
>>62183776
thats ai slop
but yeah youre right it cant die before the anniversary
is there info on the real 30th anniversary set yet?

62183886
>>62181438
It's basically fallout bottlecap money.

62183943
>>62181426
Nigga this went 5x in one year, the only position you should have now is short position.

62183951
>>62181426
My very first business idea as a little kid was a website for tabulating the rarity + prices of pokemon cards
My dad talked me out of it since he thought there would be no demand and that I'd have no way of finding out all the rarities and keeping up with it all by myself
I hope I don't accidentally discourage my kids from their ideas with how hard they'll be to actualize before they actually give it an honest try

62184077
>>62183787
nothing yet, TPC only reveals info on new sets a few weeks before it actually comes out

>>62183951
Ouch, you missed out badly and your dad is a dumbass boomer. That's what tcgplayer is now.

62184084
>>62181426
Have you managed to sell at a profit? Like big money 20k or more.
I suspect it suffers a lot from liquidity specially if you are not in USA.

62184131
>>62183046
No you think that you have 200k worth. I can sell my Bitcoin right now you have to go through 20 hoops and talk to brown subhumans all day trying to haggle you down. No thanks

62184152
ai slop doing better job than those pokechink

62184158
>>62184131
I can touch my pokemon cards right now you have to rely on a distributed system filled with scammers and hopeless narratives.

item.title: The LINK token has value — 53 replies — 212.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
The LINK token has value

Open thread • Replies: 53 • Updated: 2026-05-03 16:56 UTC

OP

The LINK token has value

Early replies (first 3)

62176216
New Chainlink report
https://bitwiseinvestments.com/crypto-market-insights/chainlink-in-plain-english

62176226
>>62176214
>In many cases, nodes must stake LINK before they can provide and be compensated for their services. If they provide incorrect data, they are penalized and lose a portion of the LINK they have staked. This system helps ensure the integrity of Chainlink’s services while also
reducing the free-floating supply of LINK.
Speaking in present tense. I assume this and the and the other clues we've seen in the past couple weeks mean staking imminent?

62176244
>>62176226
What other clues

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62176415
>>62176409
oh stinkie
who do you thinks gonna buy link at $10? $50? $100? $500? will it be losers like you? are you sure there is enough cash in all the losers of the world to pump the price to heckin a thousand USD?
face it stinkie: you lost the game of crypto, finance, and ultimately life itself

62176418
>>62176415
Don't reply to me ever again ranjeesh.

62176477
do stinkies even understand that pain and misery are LITERALLY their only friends

62176567
>saaars do not listen to the fuddergods, link token has value ssars! link token needed! do not redeem!

kek, who has ever even ehard of the bitwise

62176598
>>62176477
You’ve been posting here multiple times a day using the same formula for over a year. The style is played out. Aren’t you bored? Clearly you’re not very smart or inspired. You’re not dissuading the newfag or making anyone sell, so what are you doing? All you’re doing is showing the world how pathetic you are. Try something new, I promise it will feel good.

62176740
Is it march already? Weren't we supposed to be pumping in march???

62176756
I'm just going to hold until all tokens are distributed. Is that okay with you?

62176892
>>62176477
Welcome to another Chainlink thread
Be nice!

62176910
>>62176284
I dumped LINK and I moved into BTC. I started staking some recently and might start lending too with TBV now becoming more relevant. Will I make it with just BTC?

62176913
>>62176910
will you make it if what you're holding does a 2x?

62176989
>>62176914
What date is this video from?

62177088
>>62176295
Shartemis betray

62177113
>>62176284
>>62176298
>>62176344
>>62176415
>>62176477

62177436
>>62176989
2025. In the video they're expecting good things from 2026

62177765
>>62177436
I have expected good things for many years now. I'm still a believer but not a short term believer. Over the mid to long term I still think we'll win but it's definitely gonna be 10 years further down the line than we hoped for in 2018. In 2018 I'd said 2023 would be the year. But 3 years after that I don't see much in terms of price action, and who knows about actual adoption when the above video is still talking about trials, even if they are live trials.

62177825
>>62177765
at least they stopped calling them proof of concepts. bagholders really didn't like that term anymore. trials is also played out, so live trials it is. maybe they can call it "limited production usage" next, what do you think? would you like that term?

62177889
>>62176214
value like a new car has value, sure..

62177980
>>62176214
Only 273,000,000 LINK tokens left to dump before the team start dumping the reserve tokens. LOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOLOL. Get fucked stinkies

62177984
>>62177980
My ID is real fr no cap

62178008
>>62177825
Zach and that insufferable faggot, nullpackets, have been yapping about "live pre-production" for the past 2 years
it's truly hilarious

62178052
>>62178008
Ever since their breadcrumb boy at SWIFT stepped down there has been literally not a single shred of good news for the stinkers.

62178211
chainlink is the plumbing of the new finance world, and Link is the shit that flows through the pipes

on the other end of those pipes are link holders, whom sit with mouths open as receptacles to collect, drink, and shower in said shit

they do this with a smile on their face. why you ask? well, because, they are....

THE Cuckolds of crypto

62178228
just admit you lost the game of life, stinkies

62178833
>>62178052
>seething at Tom

Cripple detected

62179742
>>62177984
your id has fboy in it, that is really funny
>>62178228
thanks for posting in the Chainlink thread
>>62177088
How? There's nothing for them to betray, they posted speculation then left
>>62177765
>I have expected good things for many years now.
That's good, meaning the company has been running strong for years, meaning the it's not a scam, meaning the number is going up over time

62181961
>>62176214
True, it's 9$, kek

62182305
>>62179742
I don't think it's a scam at all. I'm just unhappy with the price action. Otherwise, the company seems to be doing great.

62182805
>>62181961
and the number keeps going up!
>>62182305
that's your valid opinion!

62184151
Chainlink powering prediction markets, the numbers are going up

item.title: The US national debt is now bigger than the entire US economy Today's debt milestone is not borne from war mobilization. — 49 replies — 196.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
The US national debt is now bigger than the entire US economy Today's debt milestone is not borne from war mobilization.

Open thread • Replies: 49 • Updated: 2026-05-03 16:58 UTC

OP

The US national debt is now bigger than the entire US economy
Today's debt milestone is not borne from war mobilization. It is the accumulated result of tax cuts without matching reductions in spending, an aging population drawing more heavily on Social Security and Medicare, and years of political leadership on both sides of the aisle that has consistently chosen short-term popularity over long-term solvency.
You fags are cooked (including me)

Early replies (first 3)

62179629
Doesn’t matter, because no one can collect from the US Govt

Refute this without sounding mad

62179630
>>62179622
breaking news: voters want stuff and dont want to pay for it

62179853
>>62179622
AI will fix this

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62180256
>>62180253
Holy shit are you fucking retarded? YOU own the debt. Foreign holders a minority. Fucking braindead low iq subhuman.

62180289
>>62180255
Yes in 100% sure we would push your shit in even before you ever get the chance to step in our country

62180370
>>62180253
>>62180255
>>62180256
>>62180289
can you stop being niggers

62180372
this could be an interesting thread

62180399
>>62180255
Even if it's 100 million based on polling thats still plenty.

62180410
>>62180399
>india at 76%
that's a little staggering isn't it?

62180412
again though this is just turning into a /pol/ thread

62180442
Only serious solution:

>massively cut social security for all boomers
>massively cut medicare for all boomers
>massively cut military spending - we should only be defending our borders, not doing golem shit for Israel
>giga tax hikes for richies and actually enforce it, like hunt down and fucking kill people who hide money overseas
>eliminate all taxes for people making less than ~75k a year
>immigrating to America now costs a million dollars per person

62180452
>>62179957
No, you really cannot force another country to pay. Most you can do is steal their shit if they move it abroad. Like sone creditors did that to some Argentine boats parked in West Africa

62181251
>>62179928
>Gets hyperinflated
>Suddenly, those 300 million will fight for literally anyone that upstages the current upper class.
Not only would those 300 million not fight for the current power structure of pedophiles in this scenario, they would fight for anyone who promises slightly lower taxes now. The entire structure is a joke and everything you believe in will be upended in one election cycle.

62181263
>>62180452
This is the actual danger that retards like >>62179928
>>62180399
don't realize because they are mentally ill.

Most of the US' assets AREN'T IN THE US. Remember that whole idea of drop-shipping all of your manufacturing and industry overseas? Remember how all of these companies are hiding their real assets in tax havens in Ireland and the Netherlands? Seems it may come with some consequences for those who don't pay, doesn't it?

It's all just as well because most US debt is held by the feds, but the parts that aren't? They could just roll up to any bank and start exchanging their USD the dollar would become toilet paper overnight. Do you want $1000 sandwiches? I don't.

62181550
>>62179629
The problem isn't that you'll be asked to repay, the problem is that you won't get any further borrowings.

62181798
>>62179622

the bank buys debt from country
then buys more.

62181803
>>62181798

this is how bankers roll

62181805
>>62181803
xd

62181821
>>62179629
on g_d?

62181849
>>62179622
>>62181803

time to buy

62181852
>>62181849

more

62182923
>>62179928
The US is a shitty nation that was a former British colony, you're not better than India. Not even 300 years of history and you're not certainly an Empire. Go fuck yourselves nigger lovers

62182943
>>62179629
And the US government cannot collect from me lol

62182953
>>62179629
I invest in Bank of China. Even if the rest of world purchase in Yuan, I profit.

62182956
>>62179622
>kslop penis mounters image
F I L T E R E D
I
L
T
E
R
E
D

62182970
>>62182923
you sound mad. you don't want Orange Man to pull more troops out of your poor country do you? go get your shine box

>>62179928
nobody's taking shit

>>62179622
still the best game in town. rage harder poor countries, US debt you will still buy, still want, and you'll continue to lend to the US

62183031
>>62180399
Those 41% are probably all aging boomers who couldn't fight anyway though.

62183049
>>62179928
>nobody has ever invaded the United States.
Exactly, Saar.

62183104
>>62179629
>because no one can collect from the US Govt
The Federal Reserve already collects from the US government. The US is only solvent as long as they do the Feds bidding.

62183137
>>62179928
>300 million all of a sudden joining together because of some anon's stupid chest-pounding fantasy
>t. retard who's been somehow asleep the past year

62183141
>>62179622
All you have to do is cut to 2019 spending levels and we would have a surplus.
That's how crazy Congressional spending has increased since Covid.

62184058
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aDAL5G9Xwn4&list=RDaDAL5G9Xwn4
https://i.4cdn.org/biz/1777749403133051.png

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=4ZHwu0uut3k&list=RD4ZHwu0uut3k
>[720p]
https://i.4cdn.org/biz/1777749468586523.jpg

62184159
>>62179629
Most of the US debt isn't from foriegn countries. It's US themselves. US Pension & retirement funds, US investment firms, US etfs etc. If US defaults you'll see US citizens and companies lose money. Holding US treasuriers aren't going to be worth as much since US isn't going to meet its obligations. Companies and people will lose a lot money. Contraction of the economy will happen for years due to this cycle. You'll also see a stock market crash and the decades of growth will vanish because nobody will want to lend to the US at similar rates. It'll probably be as bad as the great depression if not worse.


Hopefully this happens and I can a US citizen as a slave wagie.

item.title: >IS- IS THAT... A CHAIR!?!? >NO! NUH UH. YOU CAN'T JUST SIT DOWN WHILE WORKING! WHEN I SAID TO "WORK SMARTER NOT HARDER"… — 50 replies — 116.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
>IS- IS THAT... A CHAIR!?!? >NO! NUH UH. YOU CAN'T JUST SIT DOWN WHILE WORKING! WHEN I SAID TO "WORK SMARTER NOT HARDER"…

Open thread • Replies: 50 • Updated: 2026-05-03 16:34 UTC

OP

>IS- IS THAT... A CHAIR!?!?
>NO! NUH UH. YOU CAN'T JUST SIT DOWN WHILE WORKING! WHEN I SAID TO "WORK SMARTER NOT HARDER", I DIDNT MEAN LIKE THIS!!!!
>WHAT DO YOU MEAN YOURE TIRED!? THATS WHAT YOUR DESIGNATED 30 MINUTE BREAK IS FOR!!! WORK IS SUPPOSED TO BE AN 8 HOUR EXERCISE OF MISERY! THATS JUST HOW IT IS!!!
>D-DID YOU JUST SAY THAT IT DOESNT EFFECT YOUR EFFICIENCY!?!? DID YOU JUST POINT OUT THAT ITS 2AM AND THERE ARE NO GUESTS TO GIVE A SHIT?? THIS CANT BE HAPPENING!!!!!! THE POINT ISNT TO LOOK GOOD FOR CUSTOMERS, ITS TO UH- UM- PROVE YOUR A HARD WORKER!!!! BEING A HARD WORKER FOR ME IS THE MOST IMPORTANT THING EVER AND I SAID YOU CANT SIT WHILE YOU WORK!!!!!

Early replies (first 3)

62181647
>>62181643
I look like this and say this

62181651
>>62181643
i'm in my late 30s (white collar job etc.) but i still remember how fucking retarded retail/service industry managers were. even the district manager "elites" were insufferably fucking dumb retards.

62181656
>>62181643
Yes. Because you don't want employees to develop bad habits

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62181906
>>62181666
don't even THINK about being on that phone

62181909
>>62181666
>jamboy squats to shit
>toilet breaks
BLOODY BASTARD THIS IS WHY U SHIT IN PARKING LOT

62181910
demoralization spam board
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=C0j6pe043L4

62181953
>>62181725
>>62181737
>You're pathetic if you don't bow to retail middle management

Cuckold

62182016
>hey from today on all our restaurant employees will have to pay for the food here they eat during their break

62182040
>>62182016
This is a personal huge pet peeve.

62182122
>>62181643
Deal in the real world, bitch.

62182166
>>62181953
>retail middle management
This has nothing to do with that.
If standing at your wagie job is an issue or you have a problem with it, you are definitely lower class.

62182176
>>62181824
What kind of attitude is this? lol.
I can’t even tell if you’re trolling. This is peak reddit tier posting.

62182189
>>62181895
I am lanky, I stay away from barbells. I stick with volleyball, swimming, table tennis, stuff like that.
My last office gig had standing desks. I would make resolutions to stand x hours every day just to rebound to sitting all the time again. In retail there is no chance of sitting which was awesome for me.

62182199
>>62181643
give me a job right now or I will kill you

62182202
Isn't standing healthier than sitting o algo?

62182298
>>62182202
Not if you’re an American.

62182391
>>62181643
Dude I think about this all the time at Amazon and it's one of the small indicators that this society is a retard dog and pony show. Sometimes I am waiting for 10 mins for my machine to be one and I think to myself "what if I could just SIT DOWN right now?" Heck my job and a lot of the other jobs could be done with a chair.

62182402
>>62181657
When I worked at a cannery in Alaska there was this 16 yo but he was very tall, maybe 6"6? Anyways he had a position of putting fish onto a conveyor belt and he was sitting on two stacked buckets and his long arms were doing all the work. Had a good pace and was doing good work. The manager waited till he got up and snatched those buckets with such rage I was surprised. Rarely saw him like that and it was usually for a good reason. The kid wondered what the issue was but we all knew that that's simply how it is when dealing in the real world. My manager doesn't even bust his ass physically at that job so idk what he was pissed about.

62182409
>>62181656
Are we animals? Are we children??? We can control what habits we develop just fine.

62182418
>>62182409
are we human or are we dancer

62182427
>>62182402
Idk, manager was mad he was sitting. What did the kid do after?
You can sit in private imo, just not in public.

62182448
>>62182409
Then how come 90% of people are poor?

62182449
>>62181824
Great, as soon as you slip up you're fired, thanks bye

62182461
>>62182449
I simply won't slip up. Brb it's time for my hourly bowel movement. Sucks for you LOL

And to think all you had to do was respect your wagies

62182475
>>62182427
What was the issue with him sitting? His pace was just the same and due to hi unusual height he was able to reach everything just fine. These were 16-24 hour shifts mind you, 100hr work weeks

62182497
Wait until the middle management shills ITT find out about Porn at Work Wednesdays

62182525
>>62182461
What gets me is when team leads make a big show when they don't have the power to write up anyone or even the fact that none of the shit is falling down on them. Some people just get off on being in "charge" of others.

62182537
>>62181666
>uses 3 rolls of toilet paper to make the seat level again
Not My Fucking Problem.

62182610
Man I always feel so comfy reading these threads from my work from home lake house, caught a big bass last Thursday while on long boring teams meeting from my dock

62182685
>>62182610
lol legit cope post

62183229
>>62181737
Lmao cope harder cuck

62184087
I think we should start banning employees from having caffeine too. It, like sitting, is too convenient and makes the work day too easy, am I right?

62184093
>>62181666
>Turns my 30 minutes toilet breaks into free leg workout
Sign me the fuck up

item.title: Stocks and ETFs for Zoomerfag — 21 replies — 84.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Stocks and ETFs for Zoomerfag

Open thread • Replies: 21 • Updated: 2026-05-03 16:54 UTC

OP

Where do I put my fucking money? I have 10k liquid, the rest is 50/50 BTC/VOO.

Thinking about just aping into DRAM or something similar. Maybe individual semiconductor smallcaps or some energy stuff. Idk where to look desu.

Advice from any frens who've made it? I have a long time horizon.

Early replies (first 3)

62182958
>>62182934
Nuclear:
GEV
UUUU
CCJ
BWXT
BWXT
NEE
UEC

Fertilizer:
CF
IPI
NTR

62182961
>>62182934
Harbin Electric or GEV.

62182966
>>62182934
I can only tell you how to lose the money anon. Generally you do it by stock or sector picking and using a large margin.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62182973
>>62182934
>Advice from any frens who've made it?
VGT

62182995
>>62182966
this is a boomer take. im 20 and refuse to be exit liquidity. this made me sell my VOO

62183034
>>62182995
VOO isn’t the only etf that exists. It’s a fund of top 500 market cap US companies. You also have small cap etfs, or international, etc.

If you’re 20, consider investing in getting a good job or experience. Even 20% annual returns on 10k is only 2000. You can make more by finding a slightly better job or picking up a side gig. Invest in a gym membership. Or maybe buy a safer car. Go fishing with your dad.

62183041
>>62182995
Investing is always being someone's exit liquidity. This is 100 times more true with crypto btw.

62183174
>>62183041
this chart is pretty much impossible to justify buying for someone with a long time horizon. The returns are not worth it. Hence me looking for tech infrastructure exposure since its not going anywhere and will yield accordingly.

62183178
VOO
BTC is dead shit

62183184
>>62182934
picrel is insanely antisemitic !!! careful anon

62183204
>>62183178
please explain the technical reason for a 20 year old to dump into this fucking boomer shit? It's so overbought and being 20 i dont think the yield is worth it. Disprove this claim because I can't justify it myself.

62183223
>>62183204
ETFs are ways to get into markets without actually owning assets (like bitcoin/gold). It also allows for investment in sectors (sometimes internationally) that are managed. Investing in botz for example gives you access to american, japanese, chinese, etc companies all under one ticker.

62183225
Put $5k on SOXL after a crash

62183239
>>62182934
like another anon who had already made it told me. Diversification is for wealth preservation and concentration is for wealth appreciation. Don't pussyfoot with it and invest in growth stocks, leveraged ETFs, and options if you're not a retard who knows how to manage risk. I wouldn't even look at boomer indexes like VOO until you have mid six figs at least. I made 10k off of SOXL in a matter of months. And bitcoin is old news. I don't see memory or semis slowing down. But I'm just an anon on the internet, so take this advice for what it's worth.

62183241
>>62183174
>tech infrastructure exposure
Try VIGAX or VGT anon.

62183391
>>62183204
>into this fucking boomer shit?
It's up 70% in the last 5 years. BTC is up 33% in the same time frame.
VOO hit's new all time highs every week. BTC is 40% down from it's ATH.
>t's so overbought
This isn't a bad thing.

62183412
>>62182934
AI
Go all in on SpaceX and Anthropic and maybe OpenAI also.
Set it and forget it until you're 45.
You'll be nigger rich.

62183414
>>62183391
>overbought
>This isn't a bad thing.
The FOMO crowded trades are better than trying to outsmart the market and buying stupid obscure shit and getting raped.
Honestly, don't be a contrarian investor - they lose and get humiliated 99% of the time.

62183454
>>62182934
All in on SCHD

62183540
>>62182934
I will give you a hint on Wednesday, after i bought my positions. >64x gains are possible...

62184144
>>62182934
You should consider space related ETFs, since Space X will likely have an IPO this year with trillion in market cap. Like VanEck Space Innovators UCITS ETF

item.title: As gay as it sounds, there will be a UFO disclosure event in early June. — 14 replies — 52.6/hr
item.content:encoded:
As gay as it sounds, there will be a UFO disclosure event in early June.

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-05-03 16:44 UTC

OP

As gay as it sounds, there will be a UFO disclosure event in early June. How do I benefit financially from this?

Early replies (first 3)

62182969
>>62182968
proof??

62182977
>>62182968
no there wont be. its just more bullshit.
how to profit?
short anything to do with theme parks on top of mountains or anything associated with Dwayne Barry.

62182978
Start selling tinfoil hats

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62183007
>>62182968
If it happens it will be a fake psyop. There's a lot of scientist that have been taken out in weird ways lately, many of which seem uniquely qualified to be able to call out any fake psyop around this if it were tried.

So if it does go down, that's why those scientists got kekd.

62183055
>>62182968
Create a UAP disclosure meme coin and have the right marketing in place for the announce. Make sure to drop us the ticker ahead of time.

62183121
>>62183055
Pump-and-dumps are illegal, no? I meant ideas for businesses to invest in that will do well in a post-disclosure world. Not interested in shorting, either. Too risky.

62183192
>>62182968
>How do I benefit financially from this?
Well, since Cardano tycoon Charles
Hoskinson backs Professor Avi Loeb, just find out whatever he is into now and invest in it xD
>https://lweb.cfa.harvard.edu/~loeb/BI24_2.pdf

62183375
>>62183192
I didn't know anything about this. Thank you.

62183402
>>62182968
Alien waifus for the win!
Earth roasties rope.
New alien quantum-resistant BTC wallets.

62183440
>>62182968
>How do I benefit financially from this?
https://polymarket.com/event/will-the-us-confirm-that-aliens-exist-before-2027

It is 20x chance as of now.

62183510
>>62182968
This does sound very gay because it is, non-retarded people would understand immediately that going long on rocket/space companies is the play in this case. OP, yes, you are a tard.

62184056
>>62182968
What people need to understand about UFO disclosures, especially those who focus their whole life on it, is that absolutely nothing changes.

"Yes, we have 500 confirmed UFO sightings this month. We confirmed them on radar, IR, lidar, visual, sonic sensors. No, we can't intercept. No, we don't know where they come from."

Guess what changes in your life? Literally nothing, except maybe more tax funding for space. Speaking of which, would be awfully convenient for Elon and media would have a boost.

P.S. I understand the desire to know from a human perspective. But the reality is that we aren't getting any tech from it. No immortality / hypersonics / space travel / gravity propulsion / telepathy 4u.

62184092
>>62184056
they are here, thats what is means
the population of aliens on earth could be getting large and with our technology we could reveal them sooner then they want. They need to very slowly get us used to the idea.
slow acknowledgment is first
then I predict governments will say they have secret meetings with them or are in communication
they will be like the guild pilots in Dune. unseen mystery for a long time

62184121
I really wish aliens were real but every scientific evidence we have so far just proves that they aren't. And most people can't even seem to comprehend just how much energy it takes to travel from one star to another, the total amount of energy human civilization has used up isn't even enough to travel to the nearest star system 4 light years away. Scifi really fucked up people's ideas of space travel with warp drives or stargates, but the reality is it's too incomprehensibly difficult.

item.title: I'm a cockroach breader and make 10k-50k per month AMA — 26 replies — 33.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
I'm a cockroach breader and make 10k-50k per month AMA

Open thread • Replies: 26 • Updated: 2026-05-03 16:14 UTC

OP

I'm a cockroach breader and make 10k-50k per month


AMA

Early replies (first 3)

62181591
>>62181573
Did you ever have an "escape" situation? haha. if you know what i mean. like, did they ever "escape"? haha. anyways, what I mean is, did it ever happen that your cockroaches "escaped"? lol. just asking for a friend, haha. like, "escaping", you know? haha. anyways.

62181600
>>62181573
Big market for breaded cockroaches? Sounds like something you'd get at an asian market.

62181602
>>62181573
I had German roaches in the new apartment I moved into and told the landlord right away. Some nigger came into my apartment sprayed some bullshit behind my fridge for 2 seconds and he left. I set traps by myself and stayed up for 16 hours killing these mother years and spraying various chemicals into the walls to kill them. Bait killed the rest. Moral of the story? White people have to take care of everything by themselves

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62181603
>>62181573
in another thread you claimed $2k a month. which is it, mr. LARP?

62181606
>>62181587
To make that much id need 50k-100k

I have a warehouse I rent where I have farm that keeps them there. I usually buy 200 dollar worth of food and have contacts who let me buy their garbage.


I'm honestly trying to get into having my cockroaches be used as a protein source since it's so cheap to raise them
>>62181573
Yeah happens all time when your raising thousands. I probably lose hundreds every month >>62181600
Yeah I mean they're used in fish farms , Chinese medicine, pet stores , lizard feed and pharmaceutical applications. I'm mostly in pet store business and help supply lot of stores in my area. >>62181602
German roaches aren't typically breezed since they're tiny and easily escape >>62181603
? Can u link this

62181743
>>62181606
>i want zem to eat ze bugs
You hooknosed coin shavers have it all wrong. Western world doesnt want to eat ze bugs. But you could convince 50% of the third world to do it easily.

62181751
>>62181606
>Chinese medicine
The Chinese considering almost anything alive as "medicine" is the reason why most global diseases in both history and the contemporary era comes from China.

62181812
>>62181606
wow up to 2 dollars a roach? who's buying? is it jews that bring keep bringing them into their apartments to skip out on rent even though the landlord is getting pest treatment?

62181820
interesting thread, wish it wouldn't turn into a fucking /pol/ thread

62181826
What do rockroaches taste like

62181833
>>62181826
it tastes like cock

62181838
>>62181812
Well I don't only sell cock roaches but u can sell their bodies , and poop as fertilizer especially to weed growers since cockroach poop is good bio stimulant.

62182327
>>62181573
I buy roaches for my bearded dragon sometimes, but always refer to them as "isopods" so I don't upset my roommates sensibilities
I do not have a question for you

62182655
kek turkish jannie rage deleted fpbp

62182661
>>62181573
I knew a guy that sold huge disgusting cockroaches to pet stores for $3-$5 each. I wonder if you're Op. I'm jelly but still seems kind of disgusting though

also this >>62181591

62182694
>>62181573
The jew fears the cockroach breeder.

62182704
>>62181573
Why are cockroaches worth so much OP? No one else wants to do it?

62183197
>>62181573
So they pay you stud fees or what?

62183302
>>62181573
That's your mum.

62183404
>>62181573
But why?

62183406
>>62181573
how is life living in chinkland?

62183695
>>62182655
what was it?

62183759
>>62181573
The jew fears the indoor roach farmer

62183782
>>62181573
how many cockroachs it take before the sound they make overlaps, resembling you standing in a screaming hell?

62183865
>>62181591
THIS DOESN'T READ HOW YOU SAY IT IN YOUR FUCKING HEAD YOU STUPID NIGGER NOBODY ON THE INTERNET KNOWS YOUR RETARDED DUMB FUCK PERSONALITY ONLINE DUMBASS

62184036
>>62183695

item.title: ITT: BIG TOBACCO — 14 replies — 21.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
ITT: BIG TOBACCO

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-05-03 16:21 UTC

OP

Who’s evilmaxxing their portfolios?

Early replies (first 3)

62182863
Here’s my thesis (thanks ai slop bot)

- Tailwinds -

>ZYN MRTP approval pending. would be the first tobacco product in history legally permitted to advertise “lower risk of cancer” vs. cigarettes; not priced by markets

>Synthetic nicotine (BAT Velo Plus) could escape GICS tobacco classification entirely, unlocking ESG capital flows at scale.

>FDA pilot program actively fast-tracking pouch PMTAs. regulatory posture structurally reversed under current administration.

>Nicotine pouches organically embedding in finance/tech workplace culture without company-driven marketing

- headwinds -

>Federal flavor ban remains the single largest binary risk. It would collapse the NGP growth thesis across all names simultaneously.
>No 10-year safety data exists; one adverse cohort study could trigger rapid regulatory reversal.
> ESG exclusion lists continue suppressing institutional capital regardless of financial performance. the re-rating catalyst is regulatory, not financial, and timing is unpredictable

62182864
>>62182861
BTI was a buy at $30 and 10% yield. im less interested at current prices.

62182867
>>62182861
everyone should

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62182879
>>62182867
MO is too pumped to buy however. still a divvy king but fuck buying it 150% extended from the 200. otherwise a great stonk. ppl got rich of MO leaps the last couple years.

62182882
anyone bullish on liqor? BF.B, DEO?

i know drinking is declining but the stocks have cratered also.... at a certain price there should be some value there.

62182894
I’m a bit of a scumbag myself

T.hold 400 shares of MO

62183657
>>62182879
>MO is too pumped to buy however.
why didn't you buy it years ago when it was much cheaper?

62183664
>>62182882
>at a certain price there should be some value there
Not until gen z starts drinking heavily. Alcohol demand is sagging because it's interacting with the boomers' medications so they're having to cut back on their bottle-a-day habit.

62183669
>>62182882
during recessions people always drink more, it might be a good choice

62183672
I'm evilmaxxing by owning a liquor store. Nothing less elastic than selling an addiction. We even stayed open during Covid because we were an essential business lmao.

62183673
You guys are dimwitted and invest based on vibes and feels.

62183709
>>62183664
i agree gen z is not drinking. its an issue for these stocks

>>62183669
true true

62184044
This is hilarious because I started evilmaxxing my folio too, drones, cigarettes, alcohol, gambling, guns, bombs, fracking, spying, advertisements.

62184049
>>62182861
I made money on British Tobacco years ago. Nothing evil about it.

item.title: Woman JP Morgan executive Rapes and turns Male Employee into sex slave — 159 replies — 335.7/hr
item.content:encoded:
Woman JP Morgan executive Rapes and turns Male Employee into sex slave

Open thread • Replies: 159 • Updated: 2026-05-03 16:32 UTC

OP

https://x.com/dailymail/status/2049618941043949691?s=46

A white woman JP Morgan Executive (mega international bank) drugged and raped a married man before taking pictures of him to use as blackmail.

She would force him to take drugs like viagra so she could fuck him longer. She started buying him gifts which as sex toys including anal ones which she forced him to use and got him a position where she had direct control over him and he acted as her assistant. She also pegged him.

He was crying over the situation and talking to authorities who didn’t believe him.

She was caught when police investigated her for ties to Trump and Epstein with her blackmailing the employee being unclassified.

Early replies (first 3)

62172413
>>62172412

62172414
>>62172413
kek

62172420
>>62172413
post her tits are they big and nice?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62176994
>>62175043
she's albanian not white

62176996
>>62175827
When the bank says there's nothing there that's pretty bad.
Also he's Indian so it's clearly fanfiction.

62177044
>>62174634
>>62174688
Basically this, it was a jeet writing his own fanfiction on his laptop but he forgot to delete them before they were checked out by LEO

62177061
>>62172448
dudes, i've never felt so abandoned by god as i do in this moment

62177089
>>62172412
what the fuck is wrong with this faggot? if this shit happened me i'd quit my job to solely be her live in fuckmeat. i'd do all the weird nasty shit she'd be into as well like huffing her farts in a gas mask.

>>During the second encounter, Hajdini allegedly ordered him to suck her toes, pushed him to the ground and sat on his face, berating him when he was unable to sustain arousal.

I don't even like toes either dude but you'd bet your fucking ass i'd be cleaning every grain of dirt off of those fucking things and smelling the fuck out of them. fucking loser faggot

62177151
lmao this is exactly how Indians think white women are. It's so obvious that it's jeet delusions

62177156
>>62177089
This is all pajeet bullshit lies. Why would you trust anyone who shits in the street.

62177231
>>62172412
Aaaaaaand it turns out the jeet literally made it all up.

62179620
>>62177089
>I don't even like X but I would do X
get your T tested, see if you're able to do a flip off a bridge.

62179655
>>62174634
>show bobs and vagene
let a man dream

62180085
>>62172412
It's fake.
How do I know?
1. No one in the US calls Indians Asians.
Let alone calling an Indian guy "little brown Asian boy"
2. He claims to have a Asian wife, but doesn't in reality.
It's buck breaking 2.0 SAARS edition

That women will forever be blasted by that fake civil suit.

62180177
fake and gay

62180263
>>62173170
You were right.

62180643
>>62174634
This sounds very fake.
I suggest that alternatively
>Jeet with wife sexually harassed his woman boss
>Is denied and loses 3000 izzat
>Makes up this story to recoup his losses

62180818
>>62176986
It's AI you mong

62180821
>>62173364
>pending

FFS leave her alone.


>>62176674

Is that real?

62180823
>>62172454
Literally younger jack ma with a wig

62180838
>>62172412
Whats the deal with her, is she married/kids?
Is she really Albanian?

62180849
>>62174807
>western women in japan or thailand getting no dates

lol. they would 100% get tons of dates from asian men who want a blonde gf. but they are probably just picky bitches who want for a 10/10 western expat chad

62180851
>>62172412
>He was crying over the situation and talking to authorities who didn’t believe him.
Yeah, nobody else believes him either.

>saar my benis is so yuge that white bitch demand it from me saar

>ties to Trump and Epstein
Then why was she going after a guy of legal age?

62180859
>>62180849
>they are probably just picky bitches
Yep. I lived in Taiwan for most of the last 20 years, and the two things every white male always heard from Western female expats was (1) they can't get dates because all the white guys have yellow fever, and (2) "eww the local guys have tiny dicks and don't make enough money to date me!"

In all fairness the Taiwanese guys do have tiny dicks tho.

62180991
>>62180975
not funny

62180994
>>62172412
THIS MAN IS NOT INDIAN HE IS PAKISTAN PLEASE STOP WITH THE SPREADING OF MISINFORMATION IT IS VERY DAMAGING

62181004
>>62180991
Get sprayed, bug

62181132
>>62175811
Looking forward to the defamation lawsuit

62183872
>>62180994
All brown fuck off.

62183970
>>62183872
He's not indian, he's Nepalese.

62184054
I have not had a extensive look into the story yet.
But here is a funny aspect.

Her name Hajdini
originates from:
The surname Hajdini is of Albanian origin, rooted in the Balkans,
It is derived from the word hajdin,
which historically referred to an outlaw or brigand

They were outlaws used in europe to fight Arabs who wanted to conquer Europe
(A different way to write it is Hajduk
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Hajduk
The etymology of the word hajduk is unclear. One theory is that hajduk was derived from the Turkish word haidut or haydut 'bandit',
... because the Turkish word haidut or haydut is adapted from the Hungarian hajtó or hajdó
Other spellings in English include ajduk, haydut, haiduk, haiduc, hayduck, and hayduk.

It is interesting because aren't there posts where she allegedly refers
to his arab origin ...

62184088
>>62180851
>Yeah, nobody else believes him either.
It would at least be interesting to ask this question, and have a look at who profits from throwing her out.

item.title: Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET? — 189 replies — 96.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Open thread • Replies: 189 • Updated: 2026-05-03 15:02 UTC

OP

Is it worse to be a wagie or a NEET?

Early replies (first 3)

62158601
>>62158557
Neet
Wagie can get some money to go out and have fun, and socialize.
might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

62158623
>>62158601
>might not be your cup of tea, until you making out with a 8/10 girl who you just said hi to, 2 minutes ago

while waging at walmart is impossible

62158626
>>62158557
I prefer to be a neet, but ofc neither situation is perfect. Now if i was getting pussy then we'd be talking

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62171998
>>62158557
NEETs have dignity.

62175198
>>62158601
Skill issue. I'm working on become turboneet through three sources and will clear 93-95k when they are approved.

62175347
>>62170481
>>62170345
Almost everyone that owns a house in a top tier city came from well off families. I don’t think the majority truly realize how important family help is and how big the wealth gap is.
Good houses in good areas are truly unaffordable for normal or people in the bottom 95%.

62175361
>>62170497
> Either has their pros and cons. Waging can get enraging and demoralizing but is a wonderful source of social, schedule, productivity, and income. Neeting has freedom and self-expression but can get so isolating and repetitive that it can make you break down mentally entirely over time.
There is nothing productive about waking up at 6am everyday. Neet is a choice but waging isn’t. I think this is what no one wants to say. No one working would choose to work if they didn’t have to work.

62175389
>>62158557
Diogenes, Buddha and Jesus was Neets
nobody remembers the trillions of wagies
being a wagie is worser than being a neet

62175537
>>62167410
the real best of both worlds is WFH wagie
>forced into a regular wake up schedule that isn’t obscenely early or late
>no commute
>less oversight allows you to better enjoy the downtime inherent to any job, without giving you so much free time as to burn out media quickly
>access to your own kitchen during breaks and all the wagie bucks to buy good ingredients
>once again no commute, allowing you to instantly switch to leisure the moment the workday is done

62176675
>>62168012
https://soul-zone.org/

62177246
>>62158601
40 years ago maybe

62177573
>>62168700
>when a girl you just saw is now CRAZY into you, to the point of saying she loved you, keep trying to makeout with you, is just all over you
pointless to think about because it has never happened and will never happen

62177728
neets arent masculine and no one respects them

62179485
At least neets get to sleep.

62179529
neets because there's nothing like realizing you wasted your whole damn life and also you're a lazy piece of shit that should've just killed yourself

62179583
>>62179529
i genuinely don't know whether you're talking about wagies or neets

62179651
>>62168700
> social media lied to me
> i didn’t participate in it
> mfw
I’m not saying you’re choosing wrong, not everyone is suited to NEET life and the world needs productive people.
But maybe just have some faith in yourself that you were making your own bad choices and then turned it around when you found motivation.

62179923
After having neet'maxxd and wage cage'd and finally landed at a job I actually don't mind that pays very well the last is infinitely preferable to both of the former, but I'd put NEET above any true wagie job. I see some people act like a mundane office job is wagie work and I just assume they've never had to work in a truly dead end hellscape position. There are some truly soul-crushing jobs out there.

62179934
>>62165202
Being able to show up at the same time every day is a skill. Dealing with people is a skill.

62179952
>>62166566
It's ok anon. You picked yourself up. I fucked off in my 20s. I wasn't a neet but I have nothing to show for it. Didn't save any money. Thankfully I did enough to get into a good law school and I just graduated at 33. But it does suck being years behind people who are younger than me and making partner. However you have years and years of career ahead of you. Don't look back.

62179958
>>62166748
People who had parents who can leave an inheritance worth anything are generally successful. You're a crab.

62180244
>>62179934
Seriously. Going to work everyday day is a skill. So tempting to just take a day off.

62180261
>>62177246
>>62177573
Ok guys
I gonna go tonight again.
and next day.
If I didn’t end up making out with a hot a girl like last time, I will get back here and tell you it might have been a fluke
>>62179651
I said that because tons of guys are also getting blasted by social media and just gave up

62180686
>>62180261
Alright night one reporting in
Fail
On to night 2 tomorrow

62181149
>>62158557
Neet
>t. Neet
If you're a wagie at least you can have a social life and if it's something like working at a bar you can easily meet girls too

62181917
>>62181149
lol
lmao

62181937
>>62179923
Give examples of some soul crushing jobs. What dream job did you land?

62183586
>>62158557
I've been both a NEET and a wagie. I prefer the wagie life because it gave me the money to buy the things I like and because it forced me to grow my persona by facing difficult situations and interacting with various kind of people

62183593
>>62183586
>forced me to grow my persona by facing difficult situations and interacting with various kind of people
NEETS laugh at this as a defense mechanism for having arrested development, unable to make eye contact

62183615
>>62180261
Either way, falling for the trap of "I was brainwashed into my decisions" is retard behavior and doesn't lead to improving your life

62183617
>>62183593
Being an introvert with superior levels of grey matter and scientific proof social interaction drains my energy isn't "cope" it's facts

62183824
>>62181937
>Give examples of some soul crushing jobs
Jobs with high death risk or very taxing to health

62183862
>>62158557
Probably wagie but it kinda depends on your job.
Believe it or not there are cool jobs out there that even a vast amount of wealth can scarcely recreate.
Being one of these adventurous cunts who sails the oceans on a cargo ship for example. Battling against tall waves and somali pirates, stopping in foreign countries and getting the opportunity to travel around for a couple days, trying the local food, watching containers fall overboard as the ship goes fucking 45 degrees sideways in a storm. The works.

That being said, I'd take NEETdom over having to flip burgers or work a register all day. And I'd take a bullet over ever having to wash dishes ever again.

item.title: META — 16 replies — 27.1/hr
item.content:encoded:
META

62182516
>>62182514

62182521

nah, people have just been reduced to cattle
by glowies etc.

if anyone is geniuses it's 20th century glowniggers

62182524
>>62182514
uh no he was actually a genius. He built software in high school and was one of the smartest in his class at Harvard...

More genius than Musk, Altman or anyone else

62182578
>>62182514

Yeah I'm sure it was luck that he's a reptile and a member of the clan.

>>62182477

>killed it because it was too much competition

62182597
>>62182477
meta rev and earnings are up with less employees.

62182602
>>62182595

genius

genius

62182649
>>62182514
>>62182524
definitely a smart guy but he doesn't shit rainbows like his image was created to seem. Everyone wants a magical Steve Jobs' dick to suck because they want a simple
>best mommy
>best daddy
best leader to follow

62183010
>>62182524
Sergey Brin, Woz, and even Gates mog him. As a businessman/entrepreneur/visionary he is mogged by Ellison, Bezos, Musk, Jobs, Altman and many others.

62183146
>>62182524
zuck is smart, but not at the level of musk because he doesn't take risks that always pan out like musk, he chose the easiest path and got paid really well

62183283
>>62183146
>>62182524
I agree about Musk but bezod would have Zuck beat. Vitalik too perhaps

62183324
>>62182477

>BoomerBook

It’s just boomers posting the worst memes followed by unironic shitposts. I remember my ex gf would constantly tell me that her dad would make pro Trump posts daily.

62183867
>>62182516
u sound like an idiot to me. no seethe. cattle nigger.

>suit alleged that Zuckerberg had copied their idea and illegally used source code
>settlement agreement for both cases was reached in February 2008, reportedly valued at $65 million
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Cameron_Winklevoss#Facebook_lawsuits

62183957
>>62182597
>earnings are up with less employees
Did you know that bathroom usage at Meta dropped when zuck painted a wall in his mansion in Florida???

62184061
>>62182477

item.title: MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage profession… — 50 replies — 22.8/hr
item.content:encoded:
MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage profession…

Open thread • Replies: 50 • Updated: 2026-05-03 14:49 UTC

OP

MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US and having the footage professionally edited with a pro-quality thumbnail attached. He says people don't do this because they either don't understand how easy it is to game the YouTube algorithm or they're just lazy. He says doing anything extreme on YouTube is still low-hanging fruit for fame and money, even now. So why haven't you taken his advice?

Early replies (first 3)

62161084
Even if that were true (doubt), doing youtube is gig-work, more akin to driving for Uber eats than the entrepreneurship that youtubers think they're engaging in. You can think you're "self-employed" until you do something that Google doesn't like, and then you'll find out who your boss really is.

62161086
>>62161076
The glownigger puppet wants more people to upload surveillance for the government online? And setting yourself up to be cancelled by mob mentality and no longer having actual skills for a job and a resume gap meaning you’ll never enter the workforce again?

62161087
i manage my own portfolio and fap all day, what makes you think im gonna get up and film my jew ass talking to a bunch of goyim for the entertainment of other goyim?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62162269
>>62161076
you also have to not be able to grow a beard above your neck

62162303
>>62161076
how do you make the thumbnail then?
I make extremely low effort shorts and get thousands of views everytime

62162786
>>62161076
Can any terminally online brown zoomer please explain to the rest of us normie chads who this guy is?

62162805
>>62161076
>So why haven't you taken his advice?
why haven't you, faggot? kys

62163322
>>62162173
I think he's more getting at an idea more than specifically advocating people walk across the US. Remember he got famous for saying "Logan Paul" 500,000 times or something i forget the amount, he did a lot of endurance challenges like that which got him famous. I think he's more saying people do something ridiculous and hard and memeable and film it but it cant be easy because then there's no skin in the game its gotta actually be hard.

62164259
>>62162212
Is this Mrbeast? Who the fuck like genuinely what fucking retarded goycattle will watch a video just because he has thumbnail like Mrbeast? Like seriously? They are a fucking meme and odd. Everyone makes fun of them not praise them like it's some sort of magic that will help your videos. Mrbeast is a clown and his goycattle fans are sub 60 IQ

62164413
this jewish white nigger slave is an industry plant, i'm not trusting a single word coming out of its mouth

62164430
>>62161076
>MrBeast says anyone can get a million subs by filming themselves walking across the US
Fuck it, call me Sam Porter.

62168164
>>62161076
>can get a million subs
This translates to how much in real currency?

62170693
>>62161084
you can say this about anything

62170796
>>62161122
This, so much this...

62171081
>>62168164
$60k to $1M a year depending on your output.

62171130
>>62161076
some buddhist monks did that and got ran over almost immediately

62171132
>>62162786
He's a 27yo YouTuber worth billions who clawed his way out of poverty just by grinding YouTube for five years, from 2012 to 2017. He leveraged his fame to build a burger company and a hugely successful candy company, and he plans to expand to video games and other industries.

62173729
>>62171132
He actually has more debt than money he claims

62173789
I just saw a black dude getting run over doing this lol. The car hit the breaks but was rear ended and that pushed him into the black guy. Am unsure if he died.

62176468
>>62161076
it would require talking and interacting which I wont do if im walking..

62176498
I tried YT for awhile. 6 channels. What I learned is you need good content for starters. But the other half of it is abso-fucking-lutely luck. The al-gore-rythem might decide to help you out on day 2, or month 2. Then, for no apparent reason, it will say fuck you and you stop getting views. Basically I threw in the rag because an automated system fucked over one channel, and due to YT's "circumvention policy" all my other channels got nuked. My Appeals were initially instantly rejected....fast forward a few months and magically one by one they started accepted appeals after I made the case that an automated system flagged my content as "hate speech" - despite said video having ZERO talking.

62176517
>trust me dude you can make a million bucks just FILMING YOURSELF
>there is no algorithm
Also I'm gonna say it- Mr. Beast claims to be 24 but he looks like he's 39. Like. He's fake. He's not a real person. He's a paid fucking actor paid to say and promote bullshit while pretending to be more than a decade younger. Fuck him.

62176555
>>62161076
>Bro just film yourself doing extreme acts and have a professional editor and photographer do the thumbnail while your CIA parents fund your endeavors.

62176565
>>62161076
nobody cares

62176570
>>62161076
I bet this could work if you filmed the whole thing and broke it into many parts with the whole series uploaded on youtube. I think people would at least skim through the videos so you'd get views.

62176601
These guys did it and got 5k views on average

https://m.youtube.com/@theLIVINproject/videos

62179536
>>62161086
If you're thinking about being influencer adjacent, why do you are about le workforce? You're a lost cause in either direction but to put them in the same line of choices is disgusting.

62179560
>>62170693
not for the heat death of the universe

62179939
>>62161076
the richest zoomer is a youtuber it got rich giving money away what an utterly gay generation

62181338
>>62170693
If you're a contractor for WWE or YouTube your eggs are all in one basket.
If you're a racist self employed plumber or electrician you don't have the same single point of failure besides the state review board. And they tend not to take away your license for being a racist or a trump supporter

62181360
>>62161076
So why does he spend hundreds of thousands on every video if he could make popular videos for free? Does he hate money

62183841
>>62161076
>pull yourself up by your youtube straps
Kill every boomer

item.title: Daily reminder that LINK is the most suppressed project ever to grace the earth, and the only one that matters. — 26 replies — 22.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Daily reminder that LINK is the most suppressed project ever to grace the earth, and the only one that matters.

Open thread • Replies: 26 • Updated: 2026-05-03 15:50 UTC

OP

Daily reminder that LINK is the most suppressed project ever to grace the earth, and the only one that matters.

Early replies (first 3)

62181387
There isn't a LINK suppression conspiracy. Corporations haven't been able to use it because of state regulations. It will be used when CLARITY passes, stinky.

62181404
linkbtc is stalling out, they will have to crash bitcoin if they want the trend to continue

62181427
>>62181404
then that's what will happen
prepare btc shorts

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62181431
>>62181387
>There isn't a LINK suppression conspiracy
nuh uh

62181506
>>62181431
You still don't understand.

62181776
>>62181506
You should be able to elaborate

62181787
>>62181776
mental illness doesn't have to control your life
medication is available

62181813
>>62181346
Ugh, I should have sold off when it hit nearly $30.

62182052
>>62181787
what meds do you take to dumb yourself to this level, anon?

62182809
>>62181346
>the only one that matters
Chainlink is one of the most important projects!
>>62181431
makes one think!

62183538
>>62181346
When will they stop ? Why are they doing this ? I want to escape the asylum

62183557
>>62183538
Soon

62183694
look at your 0 iq image again. the only reason your shitcoin went up in the first place is because bitcoin went up. of course it goes back down when btc sneezes

you had a 2nd chance to sell at ath($30 in 2024 is equivalent to $50 in 2021 because of dilution) and you didnt take it because you're greedy and retarded. it will be a miracle if you get a third chance

62183821
>>62181427
Way ahead of you anon

>>62183538
Its just the beginning.

62183822
>>62181346
maybe link is pointless? i mean you dont use it for anything right?

62183889
I got another one of these

62183891
>>62183889
bullrun ended the nano second LINK hit $30.000000

62183892
>>62183694
>of course it goes back down when btc sneezes

Sub-Saharan IQ detected.
The point is about WHEN btc sneezes.

62183903
>>62183889
wow people should have listened to the laughing girl midget

62183915
>>62181346
Link is not special. It's literally the same chart as every alt shitcoin. Grow up.

62183916
>>62183903
you mean the brown tranny /pol/tard? no thanks

62183922
>>62183903
laughing girl midget:
>Link can't keep up its price

reality:
>Bitcoin crashed the entire market

hmmmmm

>>62183915
Bitcoin doesn't create artificial resistance for any other altcoin.

62183947
>>62183922
Check Bitcoin against aany other alt. Ada, Dot, Avax, Uni...etc

62183952
>>62183947
I did, these coincidences pretty much never happen for those. Only Link, and then it's every time.

This pic is a great example: >>62181431

62183959
>>62183952
Solana is different. Compare Link's chart to Uni's. No difference whatsoever.

62183967
>>62183959
If Bitcoin didn't create artificial resistance for Link only it would look very different from Uni's chart.

item.title: Half of datacenter projects getting cancelled — 22 replies — 21.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Half of datacenter projects getting cancelled

Open thread • Replies: 22 • Updated: 2026-05-03 15:59 UTC

OP

I told you idiots this was going to happen. These AI TechBros aren't going to be able to force 80% of the U.S. population to live in unpowered, unlit, unheated caves just so they can suck up all the DRAM and GPUs to generate tentacle porn images.

https://www.zerohedge.com/markets/here-come-cancellations-brookfield-backed-compass-pulls-out-major-northern-virginia-data

> Recall days ago we wrote that half of US data centers scheduled for 2026 would be cancelled or delayed. We wrote then that the outlook for the US AI revolution looks increasingly more dim.
>
>The data, which comes from Sightline Climate's 2026 Data Center Outlook, suggests that just 30% - 50% of the ~16 GW of planned US capacity for the year will face risks, with only ~5 GW currently under construction!
>
> According to the article, "things get even dodgier in the coming years, with the vast majority of data centers planned for launch between 2028 and 2032 having yet to even break ground. There are a further 37 gigawatts of planned infrastructure which haven’t even received a firm completion date, only 4.5 [gigawatts] of which have actually begun work."

Early replies (first 3)

62176991
>>62176967
>zerohedge
inverse this stupid gay bear shit

62176999
>>62176967
already priced in the moment they were announced and I mean that unironically. these fucks at wall street are smarter than you. dont pretend you have more information/insider knowledge than them. you are a random faggot on the internet. no move one

62177000
>zerohedge

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62177038
>>62176991
Seethe harder.

>>62177000
Nice full house, but seethe harder anyway.

62177046
>>62176967
spray data center agents in the face with DMSO solubilized carfentanil

62177103
>>62176967
>New algorithms massively improve efficiency
>AGI achieved with current datacenters
>Cancelling those unneeded datacenters saves tens of trillions of dollars making AI even more profitable
>this is somehow le bad

62177278
>>62176967
zerohed saaar! ai is bestest thing since slice bread benchod!

62177600
>>62177046
Wow, that's detailed and specialized knowledge.

Funny you should mention that; a few years ago I used DMSO to make custom transdermal medication to test whether I was having absorption issues with a medication or if it was a metabolic problem. Turned out it was metabolic, which sucks.

62179029
>>62176967
Yeah man, the AI revolution must be fake! It couldn't be that GPUs and infrastructure take time to make. Pull your money from the stock market now and I cant take your positions and you can stay poor, forever.

62179460
>>62179029
>t. most retarded take ever

Reality: there isn't enough electrical power generation capacity in the country to satisfy the AIbros' buildouts.

Reality: politicians are not going to allow the AIbros to shut off power to the entire residential market just so they can generate loli porn for /b/.

Reality: sanity will return to the memory and GPU markets as these fake and gay AI companies are forced to scale back their plans to what the physics and politics allow.

62179463
>>62176967
just be a bull and make money for once!

62179468
>>62177038
zerohedge has been consistently wrong for 15 years

62179477
>>62179460
https://newsroom.nexteraenergy.com/2026-03-20-NextEra-Energy-receives-approval-from-President-Donald-J-Trump-to-develop-up-to-10-GW-of-natural-gas-powered-generation-to-meet-nations-historic-power-demand?l=12

lol

62179538
>>62179477
Yeah, so? They'll have that built in five years.

>>62179468
I know. It's a literal Soviet propaganda website. The guy who runs it is literally the son of a Bulgarian KGB agent. He got thrown out of Wall Street and has spent the last 19 years trying to harm the U.S. by spewing literal Russian propaganda.

Once you know this and read his shit with this in mind, it becomes possible to distinguish between "this is garbage and is just what the Kremlin wants to push to harm the U.S." and "this is a rational take on the situation." Reminder that most propaganda has some truth mixed in to make it sound reasonable.

62179546
>>62176967
That's nice, but price? And chart?
Oh yeah... ATH... Get fucked FUDdy.

62180140
>>62179460
Do you think that we have lost the ability to build power plants and electricity related infrastructure lmfao? Also btw many US natural gas plants dont run at full capacity, many don't even run at half.

62180810
>>62180140
>Do you think that we have lost the ability to build power plants and electricity related infrastructure
Well, kinda. US electricity demand was stagnant for 20 years, so there was not much demand to expand the grid. The US now relies massively on imports of transformers and other electrical components, because US industry can't meet domestic demand.

62180841
>>62180140
>btw many US natural gas plants dont run at full capacity, many don't even run at half
I guess that's why California has brownouts every summer due to grid overload.

62183977
>>62180140
Excess generation capacity doesn't help if there isn't enough transmission capacity to combine the excess generation capacity and send it to a data center

62183979
>>62179538
>Yeah, so? They'll have that built in five years.
thats good

62183985
bears timeline (always wrong btw)
>i was a covid doctor genius
>i was a tariff trade doctor
>i was a strait oil man genius
>now i am a power infrastructure permit construction doctor

62183986
>>62180841
google what a nat gas peaker plant is

californias grid is a mess because of their politics. well run states never have brownouts.
